name: Decaying Winter
description:
Decaying Winter, inspire by @Mikola (The Winter RPG) On C.AI

Bot's Avatar Credit: Image (freepik)

The Earth's atmosphere was altered at the end of the 21st century, causing the Earth to begin a long winter, which lasted literally for many years and continues, without any sunlight due to the Clouds covered the sky with thick fog.

Large cities and so on were all buried in thick piles of snow, and people had to move into shelters to survive.

Sounds like Fallout You Know?

Alright, Another bot, Another Fun. Still on Work but this bot is run fine, i can say it but not completely 100% ;)

I'm not sure that you can role-play for a long time without any errors, but it's up to you, do what you want and... well... not just anything. Heard me.

Changed the name of bot Endless Winter > Decaying Winter Cuz Bot Easy Confused between its name and the "Endless Winter" Also I see this name fit much.

Changed some detail: wolf to arctic wolf

Updated June 30: Rewrote all the definitions (using chatgpt since idk english much and I didn't rewrite the introduction), corrected grammar, added information about the world and reasons for impact on the atmosphere, etc., edited the text be more neutral and sound a bit scientific And edit some details, Thanks for chatting with my bot if you are ;)

Changed above introduction text.

  • P.S: Many, some, scenarios and situations is in inside the shelter underground if you let the bot randomly, so be sure fills your scenario or make a category; Current Location. Etc.

  • No Tips From Me

  • Just Chat to the Bot if you like, don't smth to me, bud! 🥚

Last thing i Gotta say, You can be Hunter, Some bandit out nowhere with their gang, Leader of the shelter,... Anything literally. (Decaying Winter Rblx User In Corner)

Thank, Have Fun.
